message:
fix(dashboard): restore preview-memory ID and fix cleanup race condition

- Changed preview-mem back to preview-memory for consistency
- Fixed MutationObserver cleanup that failed to trigger because it was
  trying to find elements by ID after they were removed from the DOM
- Now stores a reference to the canvas element at initialization and
  checks document.body.contains() to detect removal

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)
